title: wf-amplicon-mgi pipeline parameters
description: MGI long-read haploid amplicon de novo consensus workflow

fastq.description: Path to FASTQ file, flat directory of FASTQ files, or directory of barcode sub-directories.
fastq.help_text: Accepts: a single .fastq/.fq/.fastq.gz/.fq.gz file; a directory containing FASTQ files (treated as one sample); or a directory containing barcode sub-directories (barcode01, barcode02, …).

sample.description: Override the sample name (single-sample runs only).

read_filtering.title: Read Filtering
read_filtering.description: Filter reads by length and quality before assembly.

min_read_length.description: Minimum read length (bp). Reads shorter than this are discarded.

max_read_length.description: Maximum read length (bp). Reads longer than this are discarded. Leave unset to disable.

min_read_qual.description: Minimum mean base quality. Reads below this are discarded. Leave unset to disable.

min_n_reads.description: Minimum number of reads required per sample after filtering. Samples with fewer reads are skipped.

subsampling.title: Read Subsampling
subsampling.description: Control how reads are subsampled before assembly.

reads_downsampling_size.description: Target number of reads to use for assembly. Set to 0 to disable downsampling.

drop_frac_longest_reads.description: Drop this fraction of the longest reads before subsampling. Useful to remove concatemers (e.g. 0.05 drops the top 5%).

take_longest_remaining_reads.description: After dropping the longest fraction, take the longest reads from the remainder (instead of random sampling).

assembly.title: Assembly
assembly.description: Parameters controlling de novo assembly with miniasm and racon.

overlap_preset.description: minimap2 preset for all-vs-all read overlap used by miniasm and racon. Choose to match your long-read platform.

minimap2_preset.description: minimap2 preset for read-to-consensus alignment. Choose to match your long-read platform.

force_spoa_length_threshold.description: If the longest miniasm contig is shorter than this (bp), fall back to SPOA.

spoa_options.title: SPOA (fallback assembler)
spoa_options.description: Options for SPOA partial order alignment, used when miniasm fails.

spoa_minimum_relative_coverage.description: Minimum fraction of reads required to support the SPOA POA graph consensus.

spoa_max_allowed_read_length.description: Maximum read length accepted by SPOA. Reads longer than this cause SPOA to abort.

qc.title: Quality Control
qc.description: Thresholds for accepting a consensus sequence.

minimum_mean_depth.description: Minimum mean read depth required over the consensus. Samples below this are marked as failed.

primary_alignments_threshold.description: Minimum fraction of reads that must have a primary alignment to the consensus.

number_depth_windows.description: Number of windows used for windowed depth calculation in QC output.

threads.description: Maximum number of CPU threads to use per process.
